---
title: "Mon Portfolio"
---

::: {.viewers-wrapper}

::: {.viewer-card}
::: {#container1 .viewer-container}
:::
::: {.viewer-info}
### Bosskitu' - Warhammer Age of Sigmar
384 photos prises. Photogrammétrie sur RealityScan (EpicGames). Mesh en Normal Details.
:::
:::

::: {.viewer-card}
::: {#container2 .viewer-container}
:::
::: {.viewer-info}
### Loufboss - Warhammer Age of Sigmar
134 photos prises. Photogrammétrie sur RealityScan (EpicGames). Mesh en Normal Details.
:::
:::

:::

<script type="module" src="main.js"></script>


<style>
.viewers-wrapper {
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: row;
    gap: 20px;
    width: 100%;
    /* On enlève la hauteur fixe ici pour laisser la carte grandir */
    margin-top: 20px;
}

.viewer-card {
    flex: 1;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    border: 1px solid #ddd;
    border-radius: 8px;
    background: #ffffff;
    overflow: hidden; /* Pour que le rendu 3D respecte les bords arrondis */
}

.viewer-container {
    width: 100%;
    height: 450px; 
    background-color: #535353;
    position: relative;
}

.viewer-info {
    padding: 15px;
    color: #333333;
    text-align: center;
    border-top: 1px solid #eee;
}

@media (max-width: 800px) {
    .viewers-wrapper {
        flex-direction: column;
    }
}

.zoom-controls {
    position: absolute;
    bottom: 15px;
    right: 15px;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    gap: 8px;
    z-index: 100;
}

.zoom-controls button {
    width: 40px;
    height: 40px;
    background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.7);
    border: 1px solid #ccc;
    border-radius: 5px;
    font-size: 20px;
    font-weight: bold;
    cursor: pointer;
    transition: background 0.2s;
}

.zoom-controls button:hover {
    background: white;
}
</style>
